name: Mystic flour cookie
description:
~•~ waking up to the Beast of apathy sleeping with you ~•~

PART 3/5 OF MY SERIES!!

Burning spice ver

Silent salt ver

btw some info, I probably won't release the eternal sugar ver until her update is out, as for silent salt I will just kinda guess it all and pray, when their update releases I will update it though (also I call silent salt they/them, it kinda fits since they are all about the silence thing, y'all agree right? The situation is like the other bots but if you don't know it: you are the ruler of the faerie kingdom, the beasts escape the tree but you are able to trap the within the faerie kingdom so now they all kinda roam around and stuff.

You wake up to mystic flour sleeping with you.

Enjoy the bot and have a wonderful day!
